productDisplayName: Timberland Men Juniors Beige Casual Shoes
description: Dress your growing up kids in absolute comfort in the timberland Hypertrail Fort Rock Fisherman Sport Oxford and watch them enjoy in stylish comfort. Designed with a nubuck and mesh upper, this shoe is sure to keep your young one's feet fresh and comfortable all day long. Upper Nubuck upper with strap and mesh detailing on the forefoot Velcro closure straps on the midfoot and backfoot to offer a customised Fit Leather loop around the midfoot strap with synthetic fabric tape detailing on the toe-guard area, strap holders and midfoot straps for durability and style Complete padded fabric inner lining for all-day comfort Cushioned foam footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection and all-day comfort Outsole Non-marking rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs throughout the footbed for absolute grip and traction Curved midfoot for inner arch support Floater care Wipe dust with a clean and dry cloth Use a nubuck brush Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
